summary: Mobile side panel bug fix verification complete. All panel features working correctly after React Portal fix. Panels now render via createPortal to document.body with z-index 9998/9999, resolving the off-screen rendering issue caused by scroll offset affecting fixed positioning.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection closes immediately - may affect real-time features

passed_tests: Left panel opens via hamburger menu button (data-testid='open-left-panel-btn')
Left panel X close button visible (data-testid='left-panel-back-btn')
Left panel closes via X button
Left panel closes via backdrop click
Right panel opens via grid button (data-testid='open-right-panel-btn')
Right panel New Post button visible (data-testid='panel-create-btn')
Right panel X close button visible (data-testid='right-panel-back-btn')
Right panel closes via X button
Right panel closes via backdrop click
Page scrolling works on home feed
Scrolling works when panels are closed (no interference)
Theme toggle available in Settings popup (Dark Mode/Light Mode)
critical_code_review_comments: SwipeablePanels.jsx correctly uses createPortal to render panels to document.body
Panels use z-index 9998 for backdrop and 9999 for panel content - properly layered
BottomNav.jsx also uses Portal to render outside transform context
Panel content renders as centered modals with backdrop blur effect
Edge swipe detection works within 30px of screen edges
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile side panel bug has been fixed. Panels now render via React Portal to document.body with z-index 9998/9999. All panel features working: open via button, close via X button, close via backdrop. Bottom navigation uses Portal as well. Test user mobiletest1@test.com / Test123! can be used. Mobile viewport tested: 400x800. WebGL error appears in console but is third-party TensorFlow.js issue, not app bug.
mocked_apis_note: Watch, Marketplace, Gaming, Memories return mock data as per previous iteration notes

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Side panels were not visible - rendered off-screen due to scroll offset affecting fixed positioning inside scrollable container
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Used React Portal (createPortal) to render panels directly to document.body, bypassing CSS transform/scroll offset issues
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASSED - All panel features working correctly on mobile viewport (400x800)
